title: C2G 83140 0.5M GREY Cat5e Ethernet RJ45 High Speed Network Cable, LAN Lead Cat5e Unshielded PVC UTP Patch Cable
features: The C2G Cat5e Ethernet Unshielded Network Patch Cable provides dependable, connection for network adapters, hubs, switches, routers, modems, patch panels and other high speed networking applications. Copper alloy and gold plated RJ45 connectors with 24 AwG stranded copper conductor in a durable .55mm PVC Jacket for premium quality and extra flexibility in every day use.

For fast Ethernet networks that require bandwidth-intensive voice, data, or video distribution applications. Meets all Cat5e TIA/EIA standards, and drastically reduces both impedance and structural return loss (SRL). Each of the individual pairs are bonded together to help maintain the twist-spacing throughout the line right up to the termination point.

Constructed from high quality copper cable, this design minimises Near-End Crosstalk (NEXT) levels. The moulded, snagless boot prevents unwanted cable snags during installation and provides extra strain relief. Available in a variety of colours to easily colour-code your network installation. Each cable is individually labelled with the length for ease of use.

Snagless booted design protects clips when plugging and unplugging. Standard RJ45 connectors and unshielded twisted pair wires. Available in 11 colours to colour-code a network. Available in lengths up to 1m
Lifetime guarantee, All C2G electrical cables are designed and tested here in the UK to the highest standards. Fully compliant.
description: From the manufacturer C2G Cat5e Ethernet RJ45 High Speed Network Cable, LAN Lead Cat5e Unshielded PVC UTP Patch Cable The C2G Cat5e Ethernet Unshielded Network Patch Cable provides dependable, connection for network adapters, hubs, switches, routers, modems, patch panels and other high speed networking applications. Available in lengths up to 100m Conductor DC Resistance: 89 Ohm/km (maximum) Insulation Resistance: 100 Ohm/km (minimum) Dielectric Strength: 500 MV/m Conductor Type/Size - Bare Copper Stranded, 24 AWG (7/0/2.0) Material - H-D PE Diameter - 0.95 ± 0.05mm Colours - Blue/Blue-White, Orange/Orange-White, Green/Green-White, Brown/Brown-Whit Material - FR-PVC Nominal Thickness - 0.55mm Outer Diameter - 5.30mm Material - Polycarbonate Hood Material - Moulded PVC Contact Material - Copper alloy plated with gold-50µm Number of contacts - Eight 1000 BASE-T; 100 BASE-T; 10 BASE-T (IEEE 802.3) 4/16 Mbps Token Ring (IEEE 802.5); 100 VG-AnyLAN 100 Mbps TP-PMD (ANSI X3T9.5); 55/155 Mbps ATM
